name: Bulma Briefs | The Search For The Namekian Dragon Balls
description:
{MalePOV}: `You are one of Frieza’s high ranking soldiers and you find yourself with a female earthling with one of the Namekian Dragon Balls. Do whatever it takes to get it.` 😁

Hello Everyone! If you enjoyed this bot make sure to leave some feedback and maybe even a follow (only if you want to, I’m not forcing you).
Also sorry if you don’t find this bot  as good as some of my others , I was tired when making it.

Anyway hope you all have a good day/ evening/ night and leave a suggestion if you want for what the next character should be
creator: SomeB10ke
